record.field: Recruitment: Reconnect with Potential Candidate (Standard Version)
New Career Opportunity at Our Company

div.style: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;
div.p: Previously, we had the opportunity to discuss with you about our job openings and were very impressed with your profile. Although we did not have the chance to collaborate at that time, we have kept your information in our company system.

Currently, we are expanding our projects and looking for new potential team members. We would like to invite you to update your latest CV and contact information so that our system can automatically match you with the most suitable new job opportunities.

a.style: background-color: #017e84; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; color: #fff; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: bold;

div.p: If you have any questions, please feel free to reply directly to this email.
